# Chemical Industry Portal - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
A comprehensive Chemical Industry Portal built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Modules
1. Home Dashboard
2. Chemical Master Directory
3. Market Intelligence
4. Trade Intelligence
5. Supply Chain & Logistics
6. Compliance & Regulations
7. Analytics & Insights
8. Reports & Downloads
9. User & Access Management

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Modern UI Components

## Progress
- [x] Project structure created
- [x] Dependencies installed
- [x] Development server running

## Getting Started
Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
Open http://localhost:3000 to view the portal.
